description_long: This is a tall, rectangular bookcase with a minimalist, open-frame design. The structure consists of a black metal frame supporting four evenly spaced, dark wooden shelves. The frame is slender and geometric, with straight lines and right angles, giving the piece a modern, industrial appearance. The shelves are flat and unadorned, providing ample space for storing books or displaying decorative items. The open sides and back allow for visibility and accessibility from multiple angles, making it suitable for use as a room divider or against a wall. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the metal frame providing stability and the wooden shelves offering a warm contrast.
description: A tall, open-frame bookcase with a black metal structure and four dark wooden shelves, featuring a modern industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, four shelves, and the open rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the thinness of the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the shelves and open back design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the shelf depth and frame profile.
